# Cat fixture image credits

Test images sourced from Wikimedia Commons (downscaled to <=480px).
`cat01`-`cat05` are the original ImageNet-derived fixtures; the entries
below were added to broaden cat coverage (varied breeds/poses/lighting)
and to add multi-cat scenes. Each line: fixture file <- Commons source.

## cat (cats/)
